transcript_uid.description: Unique identifier of the transcript entity (e.g., "a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab")

status.description: Processing status of the transcript. IN_PROGRESS means generation is underway, DONE means it is ready, FAILED means generation failed (e.g., "DONE")

transcript.description: Array of transcript entries, present only when status is DONE

timestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds from start of audio (e.g., 12.5)

speaker_role.description: Role of the speaker in the conversation (e.g., "client", "staff")

text.description: Transcribed text for this segment (e.g., "Hello, how can I help you?")

transcript.text: Hello, thank you for calling. How can I help you today?
Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment for next week.
Sure, let me check available slots for you.

description: Represents the transcript of a voice call, including processing status and individual speaker entries.
